title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA ELENA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
Manila Bulletin, February 11, 2019; 115 OG No. 8, 1829 (February 25, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11195, January 18, 2019 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A DISTRICT HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTA ELENA, PROVINCE OF CAMARINES NORTE AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the

Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established a district hospital in the Municipality of Santa Elena, Province of Camarines Norte to be known as the Santa Elena District Hospital.

SEC. 2. The Provincial Government of Camarines Norte shall provide funding for the establishment, operation and maintenance of the Santa Elena District Hospital. The Secretary of Health shall include in the Department's subsidy program, support for the capital outlay of the said district hospital.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on November 28, 2017, amended by the Senate on July 24,2018, and which amendments were concurred in by the House of Representatives on November 20, 2018.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: JAN 18 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
